mnemonics: MORGAN: Mastering Operational Risks Guards Against Network Negligence (using the first letter of each word in the publisher's name to create a security-focused phrase)
keyPoints: The module likely covers foundational security principles from authoritative texts, often published by academic presses like Morgan Kaufmann.
It focuses on applying theoretical security models (e.g., CIA Triad - Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability) to cloud environments.
Key topics include secure cloud architecture, data encryption methods, identity and access management (IAM), and shared responsibility model.
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud security is solely the provider's responsibility (misunderstanding the shared responsibility model).
Focusing only on external threats while neglecting internal vulnerabilities and misconfigurations.
